case.title: PEORIA TRANSIT LINES, INC. v. CITY OF PEORIA

opinion.h1: PEORIA TRANSIT LINES, INC. v. CITY OF PEORIA, 356 U.S. 225 (1958)
opinion.h4: PEORIA TRANSIT LINES, INC., v. CITY OF PEORIA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ILLINOIS. No. 780. Decided March 31, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
John E. Cassidy, Sr. for appellant.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
356 U.S. 225 CANTWELL v. CANTWELL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF INDIANA. No. 766. Decided March 31, 1958.
William C. Wines and John C. Lawyer for appellant.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
